description: Deterministic medical underwriting rules for Trauma/Critical Illness Cover. Covers specific condition claims with survival period criteria, severity assessment, and pre-existing condition exclusions. Sources: public Australian underwriting guidelines, APRA CPS 220, LICOP, Insurance Council of Australia (ICA) Trauma Insurance Policy Definition. FOR EDUCATIONAL USE ONLY.

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('cancer') and applicant.cancer_severity in ['carcinoma_in_situ', 'stage_0', 'stage_1a'] and applicant.cancer_treated and applicant.cancer_survival_days >= 30
rules.description: Early-stage cancer (Carcinoma in situ / Stage 0/1a) successfully treated with 30-day survival period met. Low risk if fully treated and cleared.

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('cancer') and applicant.cancer_severity in ['stage_1b', 'stage_2'] and applicant.cancer_treated and applicant.cancer_survival_days >= 30
rules.description: Moderate-stage cancer (Stage 1b/2) treated with survival period met. Loading applied based on cancer type, treatment response, and follow-up results.
Advanced/metastatic cancer. Decline or defer until treatment outcome is clear. High claims risk.
Cancer diagnosis within 30 days of application. Defer until 30-day survival period is met per ICA policy definition.
rules.apra_ref: ICA Trauma Insurance Policy Definition - Cancer Survival Period

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('prostate_cancer') and applicant.grading in ['low_grade', 'gleason_score_low'] and applicant.cancer_treated and applicant.cancer_survival_days >= 30
rules.description: Low-grade prostate cancer successfully treated with 30-day survival period met. Generally favorable prognosis.
Heart attack survived 14+ days with preserved or mildly reduced cardiac function. Loading applied based on ejection fraction and risk factors.
Heart attack with moderately to severely reduced cardiac function. Requires senior underwriter and specialist cardiologist assessment.
Heart attack diagnosis within 14 days of application. Defer until 14-day survival period is met per ICA policy definition.
rules.apra_ref: ICA Trauma Insurance Policy Definition - Myocardial Infarction Survival Period

rules.description: Transient Ischaemic Attack (TIA) with 30-day survival period met. TIA is a significant predictor of future stroke risk.

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('stroke') and applicant.stroke_type in ['ischaemic', 'thrombotic', 'embolic'] and applicant.stroke_survival_days >= 30 and applicant.neurological_recovery in ['full', 'substantial']
rules.description: Ischaemic/thrombotic/embolic stroke survived 30+ days with substantial recovery. Loading based on residual deficit and recurrence risk.

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('stroke') and applicant.stroke_type in ['ischaemic', 'thrombotic', 'embolic'] and applicant.stroke_survival_days >= 30 and applicant.neurological_recovery in ['partial', 'minimal']
rules.description: Stroke with partial or minimal neurological recovery. High recurrence risk. Requires senior underwriter assessment.
Haemorrhagic stroke with 30-day survival period met. Higher recurrence risk than ischaemic stroke. Requires specialist assessment.
Stroke diagnosis within 30 days of application. Defer until 30-day survival period is met per ICA policy definition.
rules.apra_ref: ICA Trauma Insurance Policy Definition - Stroke Survival Period

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('coronary_artery_bypass_graft') and applicant.surgery_completed and applicant.recovery_days >= 90 and applicant.post_surgical_status == 'full_recovery'
rules.description: CABG surgery completed with 90-day recovery and full recovery. Loading based on pre-surgical disease extent and post-surgical cardiac function.

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('coronary_artery_bypass_graft') and applicant.surgery_completed and applicant.recovery_days >= 90 and applicant.post_surgical_status in ['partial_recovery', 'complications']
rules.description: CABG with partial recovery or post-surgical complications. Requires specialist assessment of outcomes and ongoing risk.
CABG surgery not yet completed or recovery period (< 90 days) not met. Defer until full recovery assessed.

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('angioplasty') and applicant.angioplasty_completed and applicant.recovery_days >= 90 and applicant.post_procedure_status == 'good'
rules.description: Angioplasty/PCI completed with 90-day recovery and good outcome. Lower loading than CABG due to less invasive nature.

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('angioplasty') and applicant.angioplasty_completed and applicant.recovery_days >= 90 and applicant.post_procedure_status in ['fair', 'poor', 'restenosis']
rules.description: Angioplasty with fair/poor outcome or restenosis. Indicates progressive coronary disease requiring senior assessment.
Angioplasty not yet completed or recovery period (< 90 days) not met. Defer until recovery assessed.

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('kidney_failure') and applicant.kidney_stage in ['stage_1', 'stage_2', 'stage_3a'] and applicant.treatment_status == 'managed',
rules.description: Early-stage chronic kidney disease (Stage 1-3a) managed with treatment. Loading based on eGFR, proteinuria, and blood pressure control.
Advanced chronic kidney disease (Stage 3b-5). High comorbidity risk. Likely decline unless on dialysis/transplant with excellent control.
Acute kidney injury with full recovery. Lower risk if renal function fully restored and no underlying chronic disease.

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('organ_transplant') and applicant.transplant_type in ['kidney', 'liver', 'heart', 'lung'] and applicant.transplant_survival_days >= 365 and applicant.post_transplant_status == 'stable'
rules.description: Major organ transplant survivor (1+ year post-op, stable). Each case requires specialist assessment of graft function and immunosuppression.
Organ transplant within 365 days. Defer until first anniversary post-transplant. High early rejection risk.

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('heart_valve_replacement') and applicant.valve_replacement_completed and applicant.recovery_days >= 90 and applicant.post_surgical_status == 'stable'
rules.description: Heart valve replacement surgery completed with 90-day recovery and stable outcome. Loading based on valve type and cardiac function.
Severe valve disease with surgery planned. Requires assessment of surgical risk and expected outcomes.
Parkinson's disease. Progressive neurological condition. Requires specialist neurologist assessment of stage and progression rate.
Alzheimer's disease or dementia. Progressive condition with high claims probability. Typically declined.
Motor neurone disease (ALS/MND). Progressive and fatal condition. Standard decline.
Severe burns covering 30%+ body surface area with 30-day survival met. Loading based on burn depth, location, and recovery.
Moderate burns (< 30% BSA) with 30-day survival met. Lower loading if healing well and no complications.
Severe burns diagnosis within 30 days of application. Defer until 30-day survival period is met.
rules.apra_ref: ICA Trauma Insurance Policy Definition - Burns Survival Period

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('coma') and applicant.coma_duration_days >= 24 and applicant.coma_survival_days >= 30 and applicant.neurological_outcome in ['full_recovery', 'substantial_recovery']
rules.description: Coma lasting 24+ hours with 30-day survival and good neurological outcome. Loading based on cause and residual effects.

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('coma') and applicant.coma_duration_days >= 24 and applicant.coma_survival_days >= 30 and applicant.neurological_outcome in ['partial_recovery', 'minimal_recovery']
rules.description: Coma with partial or minimal neurological recovery. High risk of long-term disability. Requires specialist assessment.
Coma diagnosis within 30 days of application. Defer until 30-day survival period is met.
rules.apra_ref: ICA Trauma Insurance Policy Definition - Coma Survival Period

rules.condition: applicant.has_condition('sepsis') and applicant.sepsis_severity in ['moderate', 'severe'] and applicant.sepsis_survival_days >= 30 and applicant.recovery_status == 'full'
rules.description: Moderate to severe sepsis survived 30+ days with full recovery. Lower loading if no organ damage or underlying conditions.
Septic shock survivor with 30-day survival. Requires assessment of organ damage and underlying susceptibility.
Sepsis diagnosis within 30 days of application. Defer until 30-day survival period is met.
rules.apra_ref: ICA Trauma Insurance Policy Definition - Sepsis Survival Period

rules.description: Pre-existing cancer disclosed within 6-month lookback period. Per LICOP, insurer may exclude or decline based on condition.
Pre-existing cardiovascular disease within 6-month lookback. Requires specialist assessment. May attract condition exclusion.
Pre-existing diabetes within 6-month lookback with poor control (HbA1c > 8.5). Loading or condition exclusion.
Age 65-69. Elevated trauma/CI risk with shorter expected benefit period. Loading applied.
Age 70-74. High trauma/CI risk. Requires senior underwriter assessment. May attract heavy loading or condition-specific exclusions.
Age 75+. Outside standard underwriting range for most trauma/CI products. Decline.
Three or more medical conditions. Interaction effects and cumulative risk require senior underwriter assessment.
